Refresh dashboard data

Drop in the latest SharePoint exports. Only add what changed — anything you skip keeps its current values. Everything recalculates locally in your browser.

✓ User_Registrations.csv
Scoring note: points are awarded only once a match has an actual result entered, exactly as the official rules read. (The old report quietly gave a point for any 0–0 tip on an unplayed match — fixed here.)
